description: A consolidated tax reporting statement from a financial institution summarizing 1099 forms such as 1099-DIV, 1099-INT, and 1099-MISC.

account_holder_name.instruction: The full name of the account holder as printed on the statement.

account_number.instruction: The account number associated with the brokerage or investment account.

financial_institution.instruction: The name of the financial institution issuing the tax reporting statement, e.g., Fidelity Investments.

tax_year.instruction: The tax year the statement applies to.

dividend_income.instruction: Total dividends reported for the tax year, typically from 1099-DIV forms.

interest_income.instruction: Total interest income reported for the tax year, typically from 1099-INT forms.

misc_income.instruction: Total miscellaneous income reported for the tax year, typically from 1099-MISC forms.

federal_tax_withheld.instruction: Total federal tax withheld as reported on any of the included 1099 forms.

state_tax_withheld.instruction: Total state tax withheld as reported on any of the included 1099 forms.

form_types.instruction: List of IRS forms included in the statement, such as 1099-DIV, 1099-INT, 1099-MISC, or 1099-B.
